refined_fr.refined_fr: The NGHE solution shall derive performance requirements from worksite mission context, record these requirements with traceability to inputs, and manage updates including baselines and calibration history.
refined_fr.rationale: The original FR is broad and combines multiple functions: derivation, recording, and management. Refining clarifies these distinct functions to enable targeted design and verification.
refined_fr.verification_idea: Verify by demonstrating documented performance targets traceable to worksite inputs and a maintained history of baseline and calibration updates.
sub_frs: Derive performance requirements from worksite mission context
Record performance requirements with traceability to inputs
Manage updates to performance requirements including baselines and calibration history

candidate_dps: Algorithmic model to extract performance metrics from mission data
Database schema and storage system for recording requirements and history
Management interface and update mechanism for baselines and calibration
selected_dp.selected_dp: Integrated software subsystem combining algorithmic derivation, database recording, and management interface

potential_sources: Tight coupling between derivation algorithm and database schema
Management interface depends on both derivation outputs and stored data
coupling_check.notes: The integrated DP logically groups related functions to minimize cross-module dependencies and supports traceability.

assumptions_risks: Assumes availability of accurate and timely mission context data
Risk of data inconsistency if update management is not robust
High safety criticality requires rigorous validation of derivation algorithms
selected_dp.recommended_revision: Consider modularizing management interface separately if update complexity grows.

im_boundary.name: NGHE Solution
im_boundary.scope: Software subsystem responsible for performance requirement derivation, recording, and management within the overall NGHE system

external_interfaces.name: Telemetry
external_interfaces.details: Receives mission context and operational data for performance derivation

external_interfaces.name: Tasking
external_interfaces.details: Outputs derived performance targets to other system components or operators

external_interfaces.name: Network Link
external_interfaces.details: Supports data synchronization and update management across distributed modules

module_containment_scores.notes: High containment as this module logically owns the performance requirement functions; low diffusion risk.
Vehicle module has limited direct involvement; assigning here would increase diffusion and duplication.
Teleoperation is focused on control and does not own performance requirement derivation.
Safety Services may consume performance data but should not own derivation or management.

assigned_im.containment_hypothesis: Centralizing performance requirement derivation and management in NGHE Solution minimizes diffusion and supports traceability.
containment_risks: Potential complexity growth in NGHE Solution if other unrelated functions are added
Dependency on Telemetry and Network Link interfaces requires robust interface management
assigned_im.recommended_revision: Monitor complexity and consider splitting management interface if update logic becomes complex.

fr_dp_gate.reason: The refined FRs map clearly to selected DPs with logical cohesion and traceability.

diffusion_risks: Low diffusion risk due to centralized ownership in NGHE Solution module
dp_im_gate.containment_notes: Containment scores support assignment to NGHE Solution; interfaces are well defined.

fr_im_gate.verification_feasibility: Verification can be performed via documented traceability and update history within NGHE Solution module.
fr_im_gate.allocation_clarity: Clear allocation of functions to NGHE Solution with defined external interfaces.

recommended_revisions: Review complexity of NGHE Solution module periodically to avoid excessive coupling.
Ensure interface contracts for Telemetry and Network Link are stable and well defined.

decision.justification: The decomposition is sound but the management update function may require further refinement to handle complexity and safety criticality.
next_level_sub_frs: Derive performance requirements from worksite mission context
Record performance requirements with traceability to inputs
Manage updates to performance requirements including baselines and calibration history

revise.why: To further decompose the management update function for clarity and safety assurance.

assumptions: Mission context data is accurate and timely
Interfaces Telemetry, Tasking, and Network Link are stable
open_risks: Complexity growth in NGHE Solution module
Data consistency and update management robustness
evidence_needed: Validation of derivation algorithms under safety critical conditions
Demonstration of traceability and update history maintenance
